fields.name: Fire
fields.description: Burning heat and flames. Ignites flammable materials, countered by cold and water.

fields.name: Cold
fields.description: Freezing temperatures and ice. Slows and immobilizes, countered by fire.

fields.name: Lightning
fields.description: Electrical energy. Conducted by metal and water, grounds through earth.

fields.name: Acid
fields.description: Corrosive substances. Dissolves materials over time, ignores some armor.

fields.name: Poison
fields.description: Toxic substances affecting living creatures. Progresses over time, can be cured.

fields.name: Shadow
fields.description: Darkness and negative energy. Drains vitality, countered by radiant.

fields.name: Radiant
fields.description: Pure light and divine energy. Sears darkness, particularly effective against undead.

fields.name: Force
fields.description: Raw kinetic and magical force. Pure impact, few resistances exist.

fields.name: Sound
fields.description: Sonic vibrations and thunder. Shatters brittle materials, deafens.

fields.name: Psychic
fields.description: Mental assault and psionic energy. Bypasses physical armor, affects the mind.

fields.name: Physical
fields.description: Generic physical trauma - cuts, impacts, piercing. Reduced by armor.

fields.name: Abyssal
fields.description: Pure corruption and oblivion magic. Magical evil radiation that corrodes body and soul. Resisted by celestial purity, devastating to the unprotected. Leaves lasting marks.

fields.name: Witchfire
fields.description: Magical napalm that burns with unnatural hunger. Not extinguished by water, spreads aggressively, terrifying to behold. Burns until it consumes or is magically suppressed.
